title: senecio multiflorus
intro: Senecio multiflorus, also known as Jerusalem sage or Jacobaea multifida, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the daisy family and is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the liver and gallbladder, making it useful in treating conditions such as liver and gallstones. The health benefits of Senecio multiflorus include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce swelling and fight infections, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and relieve symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, and is also used in tinctures and salves, although its use should be under the guidance of a healthcare professional due to potential toxicity.
